content: The notebook loaded test_data.csv (1 000 rows, 6 columns), inspected it, and found no missing values. After exploratory analysis (summary stats, correlation heat‑map), it one‑hot encoded the categorical category feature and standardized ad_spend and website_visits. No additional features were engineered. The data were split 80/20 (stratified on high_performance). A Random Forest Regressor (selected as the best model among RF, Gradient Boosting, and Linear Regression) was trained, evaluated on the validation set (RMSE, MAE, R²), and used to generate sales predictions for the dataset, which were saved to a CSV file (e.g., predictions.csv).
